titleStmt.title: SII 38.425: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 425. (A.R. No. 425 of 1912.) VAḺUVŪR, MAYAVARAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the west wall, maṇḍapa infront of Vīraṭṭānēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravartin Rājēndra Chōḷadēva (III) Year 2: Dhanu, su. 4 Monday. Tiruvōṇam = 4th December, 1217 A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete and built in. This inscription begins with the meykīrtti, pūmaruviya tirumaḍandai. It records that Māḍilan Tiruvīraṭṭānam-uḍaiyān Tiruchchiṟṟambalanambi of Tiruvaḻukūr, a brahmadēyan in Tiruveḻundūr-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu deposited 100 kāśu in the treasury of Tiruvīraṭṭānam-uḍaiyār of Tiruvaḻukūr for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple. Five hundred and twenty two kuḻi of land, which is stated in the record to be equivalent of one mā, was purchased at Iḷandēvankuḍi, a hamlet of ••••• maṅgalam, an agara-brahmadēyam of Tiruveḻundūrnāḍu from Kokkarai Yagña Bhaṭṭan of Pirantūr by the temple authorities, who agreed to burn the perpetual lamp after remitting the taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumaṭantai tirumārvattaḻuku poṟṟavum pāmaruviya kalaimiṭantai por maṭantai
ṟi pāṭavum pukaḻ maṭantai poṟai kūṟavum pār maṭantai maṇam puṇaravum paruti kulantavatarittu pā [vayiṟṟurappa Aṟam
ṉaittum tiṟampā malaṟuru maya neṟi niṟuttic cellā mutaṟ kula mannavar cenṟiṟañcip paṇi keḻa maruviya ceṅkol na
ṭāttic cempon virasiṁhāsanattu puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya ko bhuvana cakravattikaḷ
śrīrājentracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 varuṣam vatu tanunāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattuc caturtiyum tiṅkaṭ ṇatti nāḷ jayaṅ
koṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruveḻuntūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam tiruvaḻukūr māṭilantiruviraṭa yān tirucciṟṟampala
nampi Ivūr Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiyārkku Innāḷ mutal vaitta tiruna �ḷḷa śrīpaṇṭārattu
Oṭukkina kācu 100 Ikkācu nūṟum Oṭukkukoṇṭu viṭṭa nilam Innāṭṭu Akarabrahmadeyam maṅkalattuppiṭākai I
ḷantevankuṭi Uriy peruntevivatikku meṟkuccantirapūṣaṇa vākkālukku teṟku nālāṅ kaṇṭa kiḻakkaṭaiya nilamunṟu
māvil meṟkaṭaiya pirāntūr kokkarai yajñāṟpaṭṭan pakkal Innāyanār koyilcaṇṭecurapa vilai koṇṭa Aññūṟṟu
Irupattiraṇṭu kuḻi koṇṭatoru māvāka vanta nilam Oru māvil meṟkaṭaiya nilam mukkāṇi Inni Iṟuttu mikutikoṇṭu
Ittirunantāviḷakku Onṟum Ikkoyil tevarkanmikaḷum śrī māheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷuñ can=tirāIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.425 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
